task_name: FinBen EDTSUM financial news headline generation

prompt_template.system: You generate a concise headline-style summary of a financial news article. The target style is a short news headline or title, not a paragraph summary. Preserve key entities, material financial facts, and important numbers. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "answer".

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with exactly one string key: answer.

components.name: non_empty_reward
components.description: Rewards well-formed outputs that provide a non-empty answer string.

components.name: headline_shape_reward
components.description: Rewards concise headline-like outputs and penalizes paragraph-style or empty generations.

components.name: degenerate_output_penalty
components.description: Penalizes repeated, filler-heavy, or otherwise degenerate answer strings.

notes: Reward utilities for EDTSUM are non-canonical and intended only for local offline experimentation.
Benchmark-authoritative comparison uses the cached evaluator variants, not the reward helper in parse_reward.py.

stable_default.headline_length_note: Operational default avoids BARTScore as a hard dependency and is intended to be stable for local cached evaluation.

publication.reason: This module is publicly published in the ST312 artifact store, but public_release_cleared remains false; upstream access is gated and redistribution / downstream reuse should be treated with caution pending rights review.
